quality.description_clarity: High. The description clearly outlines the conditions for entry, effects while merged (sensory deprivation, spellcasting), movement, and conditions for ending the spell (exit, damage from partial/complete destruction).
quality.mechanics_completeness: Complete. Covers entry, duration limits, sensory interaction, self-spellcasting, exit conditions, and specific damage outcomes for stone destruction.

effects: Target melds into a stone object/surface large enough to contain them.
Entry requires 1 action at a touchable point.
Nonmagical senses cannot detect the caster while merged.
Caster cannot see outside; Perception checks to hear outside have disadvantage.
Caster can cast spells only on themselves while merged.
Exit requires movement; ends the spell.
Minor damage to stone does not harm caster.
Partial destruction/shape change forces exit, dealing 6d6 bludgeoning damage and expelling the caster prone.
Complete destruction forces exit, dealing 50 bludgeoning damage and expelling the caster prone.
